caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with a gold "BOSS" logo and a "BOSS" circular patch, a gold chain, and a gold watch is seated in a studio setting. He wears headphones and speaks into a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repeated gold logo that reads "UNION HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" next to red text that includes "BOSS" and "TALK 101". On the table in front of him sits a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK 101" and "BOSS". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera angle and background remain static.
